prestazioni: Replace the stock 440 RB (RB-E746) block with a forged steel crankshaft from Moldex (4.320" stroke, 4340 steel) paired with Manley 6.760" H-beam connecting rods and JE Pistons 12.5:1 forged slugs (PN: 207875) for a 500+ CID stroker build, retaining the factory 4-bolt main caps but reinforced with ARP main studs (PN: 144-5401).

Port and polish the factory 440 Six Pack (3x2bbl) cylinder heads (casting #2843906) with Ferrea 2.14" intake / 1.81" exhaust valves, Comp Cams solid roller camshaft (PN: 01-777-9, 276°/282° duration, .650"/.657" lift, 110° LSA), and T&D Machine shaft-mount rocker arms (1.7:1 ratio) for optimized airflow and valvetrain stability at 7,000 RPM.

Install a custom fuel system featuring dual Holley HP 1150 CFM carburetors (PN: 0-80781) on an Edelbrock Victor Jr. intake manifold (PN: 2924), fed by a MagnaFuel ProStar 220 GPH pump and -8AN braided lines, with Aeromotive adjustable fuel pressure regulator (PN: 13101) and MSD 6AL-2 ignition box (PN: 6420) for precise spark control under high-load conditions.
estetica: Fit a custom widebody conversion using a RareWurks fiberglass kit (PN: RW-CUDA-WB) with 1.5" flares, paired with a 1970-only Shaker hood scoop (restored with a custom carbon fiber overlay by Anderson Composites) and functional brake ducts integrated into the front bumper (modeled after the 1970 Trans-Am homologation cars).

Install a full TMI Autotech interior overhaul featuring Recaro SRD bucket seats (with 4-point Schroth harnesses), a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) on a Flaming River tilt column, and a custom roll cage (8-point, mild steel) by Chassisworks (PN: C1000) with integrated harness bar and fire suppression system (FSP FireBottle 5lb).

Apply a custom paint scheme using PPG Vibrance Collection "Plum Crazy" (code: B5) with hand-painted matte black stripes (inspired by the 1970 AAR Cuda), complemented by Hella Rallye 4000 Supertones (7" diameter) with Cibie Oscar LED bulbs, and a custom rear diffuser by RK Sport (PN: RK-7002) with integrated dual 4" exhaust outlets (Flowmaster 44 Series, PN: 817582).
